ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "package_description" TEXT /* Description of the product package */,
  "price_per_pill" TEXT /* Price per pill */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price for the package, including any bonuses */,
  "bonus_pills" INTEGER /* Number of bonus pills included with the purchase */,
  "delivery_option" TEXT /* Delivery option available for the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., prescription, OTC) */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Dosage form of the product (e.g., tablet, capsule) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  "shelf_life" TEXT /* Shelf life of the product */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_name FOREIGN KEY ("brand_name") REFERENCES product_brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_dosage_form FOREIGN KEY ("dosage_form") REFERENCES product_dosage_forms ("dosage_form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_total" TEXT /* Total amount for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which this item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item at the time of order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  "bonus_pills_applied" INTEGER /* Number of bonus pills applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the discount applies to */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the discount available */,
  "minimum_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity required to qualify for the discount */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Date until the discount is valid */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product offering the bonus */,
  "bonus_pills" INTEGER /* Number of bonus pills offered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bonus */,
  "minimum_purchase_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum purchase quantity to qualify for the bonus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonuses_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being delivered */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date when the delivery is scheduled */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the delivery */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Current status of the delivery (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for delivery */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_shipping_carrier FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_carrier") REFERENCES shipping_carriers ("shipping_carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was processed */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the payment (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity for the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level for triggering a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the threshold is reached */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_dosage_forms" (
  "dosage_form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dosage form */,
  "dosage_form_name" TEXT /* Name of the dosage form */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dosage form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dosage_form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status history record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order at the time of update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_carriers" (
  "shipping_carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping carrier */,
  "shipping_carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_carrier_id")
)
